subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is Expansion — build structural leverage without forcing closure. Use the exact Jupiter sextile Mars and Sun sextile Sun to make one concrete move: send the note, refine the document, open the door. Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection means preparation outranks performance. This is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one. Mars is fuel for the engine, not a match for old disputes. Honor the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc; ignore noise, formalize later.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is Expansion — constructive force with friction in the engine. Push the useful door open, then keep the move narrow. The monthly profection is the ninth whole-sign house, Virgo; Mercury, lord of the month, is well placed in domicile and exaltation, and presently supported rather than stressed. Use this for documents, outreach, study, and travel logic. Jupiter, in sect and lord of the year, sextiles Mars: act, but control haste. Sun sextile Sun favors clean visibility.

Moon today — Moon in Sagittarius, your 12th whole-sign house. Protect attention, work privately, and ignore noise that drains the move before it becomes useful.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — leverage opens, pressure stays real. Use Mula to strip the move down to essentials: documents, timing, cash, repairs, and the one conversation that advances the pipeline. Mars conjunct Mars is friction looking for a build, not a fight. Sun sextile Sun supports clean authority; push the practical ask, ignore noise, and save formal commitments for the Aug 12 – Sep 5 External Manifestation Window.

Moon today — Moon in Sagittarius, your 1st house, nakshatra Mula pada 2. Cut through clutter, act from the body, and watch impatience around identity or relocation decisions.

baziReading.body: Today is Jia-Xu Resource feeding Fire — expand through visible, bounded action. Use the Jia-Wu month and Mang Zhong heat to prepare, publish, ask, and build leverage without locking terms. Yang Wood supports your Ding Fire; the Dog branch strengthens Fire with Horse and combines with your Rabbit. Fire is a torch, not a wildfire. Favor output with control; ignore side contests, scattered starts, and peer-fire compulsion.

tarotCard.name: The High Priestess
tarotCard.body: The High Priestess — the answer is internal; watch and let the pattern surface before you speak. Today is Expansion: build leverage and document the move, but keep formal commitments for later. Jupiter carries the field, and Saturn is the constraint to respect. exact Jupiter sextile Mars is the sharpest aspect today — let it set the operating language. The Jupiter Return sits 13 days out, so treat today as part of that setup.

tropicalMonthly.body: The dominant influence is preparation: Capricorn Rising plus the 12th-House annual profection makes this a foundation month, not a public finish line. Through Cancer season, build leverage through agreements, counterparties, and documented asks; the July 12 Jupiter return supports pipeline expansion, but only where structure already exists. July 16 makes competence and old sensitivity more visible around career authority, so convert pressure into cleaner positioning, not overexplanation. July 23, the Sun enters Leo and shifts attention toward shared resources, compensation, and commitments. This is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one: the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc says price, ownership, and IP matter more than approval. Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight; ignore noise, formalize after late August.

traditionalMonthly.body: The month opens with the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo, and Mercury as lord of the month; Mercury is strong in natal Virgo, in domicile and exaltation, so the useful work is analysis, writing, training, and strategic preparation. Around 2026-06-30 the profection moves to the 10th house, Libra, handing the month to Venus: formal visibility matters more than private refinement. Jupiter remains lord of the year in a 12th-house Sagittarius year, and as the in-sect benefic in a day chart, support comes through quiet setup, not public payoff yet. Mercury is the drafting table: measure twice, then move the clean plan into public form. Watch Mars as the out-of-sect malefic: urgency, pride, or dispute can burn usable momentum. Build the pipeline; ignore noise that demands premature commitment before late August.

vedicMonthly.body: Moon–Venus–Jupiter is the dominant Vimshottari sub-period chain: relationship/value support, gains, and access matter, but Sagittarius Lagna plus Sade Sati (Small Panoti) keeps pressure on discipline through 2027-06-02. From Jun 29–30, as the transit Moon’s nakshatra starts in Mula, strip the pipeline to essentials; the prior External Manifestation Window closes Jun 30, so capture decisions without forcing final form. Through Jul 1–25, the Moon cycles all 27 nakshatras: what matters is leverage, documentation, repair, and useful contact; what does not matter is emotional noise or premature commitment. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. Build capacity now for Aug 12–Sep 5 2026; ignore fairness debates that do not change obligations.

baziMonthly.body: Structural lead: 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun keeps Water Power under Earth Output, so build leverage, systems, and proof before taking weight-bearing commitments after late August. Today, June 29, is 甲戌 Jia-Xu: Resource over Output, favoring research turned into concrete pipeline, not more open loops. The Jia-Wu month gives Ding Fire fuel and peer-fire visibility; the 2026 Ben Ming Horse field amplifies movement, but the standing warning holds: move visibly without turning competition into compulsion or scattering into too many parallel fires. On July 7, Xiao Shu shifts the month to 乙未 Yi-Wei, softer Resource feeding Output; July 7-Sep 7 becomes the year’s main visible-move corridor, with July 12 as a checkpoint for exposure and positioning. The Rabbit core should choose clean routes through pressure: one lantern, aimed well, beats a room full of small fires.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Build one scalable asset and ask for the next concrete opportunity today.

todaysInsight: Build leverage and price your contribution clearly. Keep commitments provisional while you strengthen the pipeline.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (13d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 78 days
